active_production_deployment.note: Confirms Production has not been touched by any Market Index change yet; this is the exact deployment from the prior OpenSERP partner-label fix mission, predating this mission entirely.

production_env_flags_check.detail: No MARKET_INDEX_WRITE_ENABLED / MARKET_INDEX_READ_ENABLED / MARKET_INDEX_OBSERVATIONS_ENABLED / MARKET_INDEX_CLUSTERING_ENABLED variable exists in Production env. All four resolve to false by default (lib/market-index/market-index-feature-flags.ts).

verifiability_limitation_disclosed.migration_history_table: not directly queryable -- no direct Postgres connection string is available in this environment (PostgREST only), so supabase_migrations.schema_migrations cannot be read via SQL. Absence of the 4 new tables and 9 new columns (confirmed above via PostgREST 404/column-not-found) is used as the equivalent proof that none of the 5 target migrations have been applied yet.
verifiability_limitation_disclosed.rls_policies_on_existing_tables: same limitation as disclosed in docs/MARKET_INDEX_SECURITY_AND_RLS.md -- pg_policies cannot be read directly. This does not block the mission: the 5 new migrations' own RLS state (enabled, zero policies) was independently verified in Gate A and Gate B against the identical migration SQL, and existing tables (property_listings, listing_sources) are not modified in RLS terms by these migrations (migration 5 only adds nullable columns).

verdict: PASS -- Production is in the exact expected pre-activation state: 0 of the 5 migrations applied, 0 MARKET_INDEX_* flags set, active deployment matches the known pre-mission commit.
